---
name: Game request
about: Submit game to be added to TTL
title: "[Game request] "
labels: Game request
assignees: TukanDev

---

**Name**
The name of the game (Ex: GenshinImpact)

**Publisher/Developer**
Who is developer or publisher of this game (Ex: HoYoverse)

**Has steam release**
Is this game available on Steam? (Ex: Yes/No)

**Has launcher login**
Does the game require to login to your acccount from its launcher? (Ex: yes/No)

**Anticheat used**
What anticheat game uses, if any (Ex: HoYoKProtect)

**ProtonDB URL**
Link to the ProtonDB for the game, if any (Ex: https://protondb.com/...)

**Are We Anticheat Yet URL**
Link to the AreWeAnticheatYet listing, if any (Ex: https://areweanticheatyet.com/game/...)

**Website**
Website of the game or developer (Ex: https://genshin.hoyoverse.com)

**Additional notes**
Any additional information if you want to provide (Ex: game does not boot without specific proton version)
